title: Hand Warmers 10 Hour Protection Heat Pads for Outdoor Activities
description:
These little packages of hand warmers are great for camping, hiking, sports events, winter car rides, hunting, fishing, and more! These hand warmers are odorless, environmentally safe, and non-toxic. Easily activated by air, all you need to do is open the package and give the hand warmer a little shake. Within minutes you will have a warm little pillow of coziness just waiting to heat up your hands, feet, or body. Make sure to have these mini heat pads on-hand during the cold winter months!

These little packages of hand warmers are great for camping, hiking, sports events, winter car rides, hunting, fishing, and more! These hand warmers are odorless, environmentally safe, and non-toxic.

  • Odorless, Non-Toxic, and Environmentally Safe
  • Air Activated
  • Working Temperature: 124 - 155 Degree F
  • Up to 10 Hours of Gentle Heat

Product Specifications

  • UPC: 060886804178
  • Color: Orange
  • Size: Small

Easily activated by air, all you need to do is open the package and give the hand warmer a little shake. Within minutes you will have a warm little pillow of coziness just waiting to heat up your hands, feet, or body.
